channel.title: Latest Updates
channel.description: The most recent blogs and online articles from The Economist

item.description: Disney turned its flagship film franchise into TV fodder. Can it go back to the big screen?

item.description: In Maine, Graham Platner is betting centrist and right-leaning voters want economic revolution more than culture war
